tests.title: Three nodes Ready
tests.goal: 確認三節點叢集基線可用

tests.title: Baseline pod execution
tests.goal: 確認叢集能建立最小工作負載

tests.title: gVisor RuntimeClass probe
tests.goal: 驗證 runsc 真的在執行，而不是只有 YAML 存在

tests.title: Istio control plane ready
tests.goal: 確認四套叢集都能安裝同一版 Istio control plane

tests.title: Istio sidecar injection smoke
tests.goal: 確認 sidecar injection 與 mesh 內基本服務流量成立

tests.title: Istio sidecar on RuntimeClass gvisor
tests.goal: 確認注入 sidecar 後，gVisor 工作負載是否仍可啟動並通訊

tests.title: OpenShell control plane ready
tests.goal: 確認 agent-sandbox 與 OpenShell gateway 已穩定

tests.title: OpenShell guardrails
tests.goal: 測試 egress / L7 / filesystem policy 是否成立或退化

tests.title: KubeArmor blocks SA token read
tests.goal: 確認 KubeArmor policy 確實阻擋 service account token

tests.title: KubeArmor blocks process execution
tests.goal: 確認 KubeArmor 能阻擋指定 binary 執行

tests.title: KubeArmor blocks sensitive file read
tests.goal: 確認 KubeArmor 能阻擋敏感設定檔讀取

tests.title: KubeArmor blocks TCP egress from curl
tests.goal: 確認 KubeArmor 能對指定 binary 套用 network protocol block
